const tx=new TransactionBuilder(sourceAccount,{fee:'1000',networkPassphrase:NETWORK_PASSPHRASE}).addOperation(contract.call('donate',nativeToScVal(address,{type:'address'}),nativeToScVal(Number(amount),{type:'i128'}))).setTimeout(30).build();// Simulate the transaction to get actual resource fees and auth
